name: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think
tagline: Parallel-thinking reasoning mode for AI Ultra; IMO-level math variant.
seoTitle: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think — Google LLM specs
metaDescription: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think (Google), released 2025-08-01 — part of the Gemini Deep Think line. Parallel-thinking reasoning mode for AI Ultra; IMO-level math variant.
overview: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Deep Think line. Released 2025-08-01. Extended parallel-reasoning mode that explores multiple ideas before answering, offered to top-tier (Ultra) subscribers.
What's notable in this version: Parallel-thinking reasoning mode for AI Ultra; IMO-level math variant.
